content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based risk-on rally with Nifty +0.91%, Bank Nifty +0.93%, Realty leading +2.72%, Auto +1.37%, Metal +1.28%. VIX cooling -2.11% to 18.07. Middle East de-escalation hopes plus election trends supporting cyclicals. Existing book has multiple positions in profit — priority is trailing SLs aggressively to lock gains, not adding fresh exposure into a strong gap-up tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1040 already locks ~+5.7% gain on entry 984. CMP 1053. Stored SL is 1.2% below CMP — within healthy trail range, no micro-adjust needed. Q4 was a strong beat (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA sub-1%) and realty/HFC sector leading today. CEO transition still an overhang so not raising SL further into resistance at 1054. Holding for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -2.1% but SL 119 intact. Risk-on day compressing safe-haven bid but structural gold thesis (CB buying, Fed easing path, $5000+ JPM target) intact. Keeping as portfolio hedge against geopolitical re-escalation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +5.2%, near 52w high (1851). Stored SL 1810 locks +4.4% gain — already at the trail-gap floor (CMP 1825 minus 0.8%). Cannot raise SL closer without violating 0.5% trail-gap discipline. Q4 results May 19 is binary event — per rule 11, will reassess EXIT or partial trim closer to result date. Holding intact for now since we're <3 sessions away yet (15 days)."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 100,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 478 is BELOW CMP 482.30 (verified: 478 < 482.30, no self-stopout). Position at +2.8% near target 495. However research flags April 2026 production -9.7% YoY and offtake -2.0% — material post-Q4 deterioration. Stock at 52w high with weakening operational data. Booking +₹1,285 gain rather than ride into the deterioration. Clear exit on fresh fundamental data."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.09 — only 1% below CMP, already a tight trail. ETF-level so less volatile than single names. Position +1.9%. Cannot tighten further without breaching trail-gap. Holding levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "new_target": 985.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, SL at breakeven 944, CMP 955.70. SL breakeven rule already satisfied. Adjusting target from 990 to 985 to reflect realistic R:R given Q4 NIM compression flag (9.5% NIM, -9bps QoQ) and 34x P/E stretched. Risk = 944-entry to 944-SL = 0 risk now (breakeven), already de-risked. Target 985 reasonable resistance. Note: original entry R:R discipline failure — reasoning at entry claimed target 990, executed 985 sub-1.5 R:R. Acknowledging that as a prior process error; not compounding it now by chasing higher target into stretched valuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%, SL at breakeven, CMP 1713.90. Q4 results scheduled May 5 (TOMORROW) — binary event within 3 sessions per rule 11. Position is small (~5% of capital) and SL at breakeven caps tail. Choosing disposition (b) — SL already tight at breakeven (-0.8% from CMP, just below trail-gap floor). Cannot tighten further. Will let event unfold; April cargo +15% derisks somewhat. If gap-down tomorrow, breakeven SL exits cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "new_target": 1645.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2%, CMP 1534.40. Stock had a sharp intraday reversal from high 1600 to 1524. Tightening SL from 1490 → 1510 (still 1.6% below CMP, respecting trail-gap). Q4 results May 14 is a binary event ~7 sessions away — outside the 3-session window but on the radar. Tighter SL 1510 reduces downside on the failed breakout candle today (open 1590 → close 1534)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6%, intraday reversal from high 13976 to 13695 but well above SL 13400. Q4 already reported. Auto sector +1.37% leadership. Record April sales 239,646 units. Holding original SL/target levels — too early to trail; wait for follow-through above 13900 VWAP."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.1%, gapped up +7.95% then faded from 10477 to 10302. Board meeting May 6 (in 2 sessions) — Q4 + buyback decision is THE binary event per rule 11. Position is ~5% of capital so within event-trade size. SL 10000 = ~3% below CMP, reasonable absorption. Holding for the catalyst rather than pre-empting. Will reassess Tuesday morning."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1040 locks +5.7% gain, already at 1.2% below CMP — tight trail respected."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor; Q4 May 19 binary still 11 sessions away — will trim closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "April production -9.7% YoY is fresh fundamental deterioration; booking +₹1,285."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "ETF, SL already tight at 1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, target tightened to 985 to reflect realistic resistance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 tomorrow — SL at breakeven caps tail, position size <5% capital qualifies as event-trade."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "Failed breakout candle (high 1600 → close 1534), tightening SL to 1510."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Position barely red, SL has room. Auto sector leadership intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10000.00,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 6 binary event; position size already event-trade calibrated."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MARUTI and BAJAJ-AUTO already held — auto sector leadership confirmed. KOTAKBANK Q4 beat (PAT +13.4%, NIM 4.67%) is a credible dip-buy thesis but stock recovered intraday from 363 to 374 — chasing here at 374.65 lacks edge; would prefer a re-test of 365-370 to enter. SUNPHARMA already held captures pharma exposure. FLUOROCHEM, LALPATHLAB, SYNGENE, BANDHANBNK gap-ups on results day are too extended to chase — would need consolidation. ANANTRAJ, GODREJPROP, INFY: no edge today. HAL, BHEL: defence/capgoods cluster — no add since I'd want to size carefully and tape is already extended.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed at 52% with 10 positions, broad sector spread (Financials/HFC, Pharma x2 incl ETF, Energy, Metals, Auto x2, Services x2, Gold ETF). Rule 11 binary-event audit: ADANIPORTS (Q4 tomorrow), BAJAJ-AUTO (board May 6), GESHIP (Q4 May 14), SUNPHARMA (Q4 May 19) — four event-risks across the next 11 sessions. EXITing COALINDIA on fundamental deterioration frees ~₹48k cash. Not adding fresh exposure today: tape gapped up sharply, multiple held names already pre-event, and prior failure modes (cluster-stacking on Day-5, same-day round-trips on Day-11) argue for restraint when book is already long beta. Cash going to ~57% post-COALINDIA exit — fine, gives optionality if KOTAKBANK or others pull back."
}
